subcodes.first_line: O Ismail the Beautiful! The scrolls and books that exist in the realm of being are of two kinds: one comprises the scrolls of hearts, which by the pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسمعیل جمیل صحف و کتب بدو نوع در عالم وجود موجود یکی صحائف قلوب که بقلم
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @material world a reflection of the spiritual
